notes: Active - extracts 'initialReduxState' from an inline script tag, then makes an additional fetch to Pinterest's UserResource API (with credentials:'omit') to pull profile stats (pin/board/story/video counts, followers, following, private flag, about, website). Displays both in a draggable modal titled 'Pinterest User Data'. Uses Pinterest's own official account as a stable public profile.
